name: Full Exclusion Scenario
description: A test scenario where client 3 opts for full exclusion, removing itself completely from all tracks, while clients 0 and 1 have regular disagreements.

expected_tracks.global: Global track (for clients 2, 4, 5 without specific disagreements)

round_1_rules.description: Client 0's track should exclude clients 1 and 3 (3 is fully excluded)
Client 1's track should exclude clients 3 and 4 (3 is fully excluded)
Client 2's track should exclude client 3 (fully excluded)
Client 4's track should exclude client 3 (fully excluded)
Client 5's track should exclude client 3 (fully excluded)
